message:
fix(tests): align E2E assertions with policy recovery and evaluate semantics

Update e2e_scenario_1 to pass None for guard diagnostics, isolating
shadow-mode evaluation from guard triggers. Update e2e_scenario_6 to
expect Enforce (pre-fallback mode) after recovery instead of Observe,
and add explicit assertion that fallback_reason is cleared.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
